title: Henko's Creation - Vanilla Flavor
description:
A modpack for my friends, based upon a Vanilla + experience with Create as its bigger game changing mod. 
A focus on optimization and QoL changes is done in order to allow anyone to play even with potato computers !
body:
![A minecraft modpack Title in the style of Minecraft base game title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf030efe1fe488fdc5eb0780786ef7227146194f.png)
# Henkō's Creation - Vanilla Flavor

> **Important:** To ensure the best performance and compatibility, make sure you're running **Java 17** for Minecraft 1.20.1. You can download the correct version of Java from [here](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?os=windows&arch=x64&package=jre&version=17).


## A Beautifully Enhanced Minecraft Adventure

Welcome to a carefully crafted Vanilla+ modpack, designed to give you the **ultimate Minecraft experience**! This pack is all about refining the game we already know and love, by enhancing performance, ironing out bugs, and polishing visuals, while still staying faithful to that classic Minecraft feel. Whether you're an explorer, a builder, or a technical player, this modpack will breathe new life into your game.

### Key Features:
- **A Seamless World Expansion:** The world generation has been completely re-imagined to offer you breathtaking landscapes and biomes, all while keeping the aesthetic style of Minecraft that we hold dear. Using mods like **Terralith** and **Tectonic**, the overworld now boasts a wide variety of new biomes, stunning caves, mountains, and forests that feel like a natural extension of the game. You’ll stumble upon vast deserts, towering cliffs, and lush valleys as if they were always meant to be part of Minecraft.

  ![An image of a landscape with rocky formations in a turquoise sea.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120f11e50aa661d500e94470107c12d4e6a082ce_0.webp)

- **Overhauled Nether and End Dimensions:** Your adventures won’t stop at the overworld! Prepare for a completely new challenge in a **revamped Nether** thanks to **Incendium**, filled with eerie biomes, strange creatures, and structures that make survival even more intense. As for the **End dimension**, it has been vastly expanded with projects such as **Nullscape**, offering not just a final boss fight but an entire world to explore, full of floating islands, lush alien forests, and ancient ruins. Both dimensions have been re-imagined while staying true to the hauntingly beautiful tones of the base game.

- **Create Mod Integration:** While the modpack preserves much of the vanilla experience, one major gameplay addition takes center stage—**the Create Mod**. This mod allows players to build complex mechanical systems, from simple automation setups to entire factories that will blow your mind. Add-ons to the Create Mod ensure that there’s always something new to discover in your engineering and automation adventures, without overwhelming you if you're more familiar with traditional Minecraft gameplay.

### Visual and Sound Enhancements:
This pack goes beyond just gameplay improvements. It’s all about making Minecraft look and feel better, without deviating from its charm. Expect to see:
- **Enhanced lighting effects** for a more immersive atmosphere
- **Improved textures** that sharpen the world’s details without breaking the signature pixel art
- **Ambient sounds** that create a richer soundscape, helping to immerse you fully in your environment

### Multiplayer Features:
For those diving into multiplayer, the modpack introduces a few key features to enhance the cooperative (and competitive) experience! **Land claiming** allows you to protect your builds, ensuring that no one can tamper with your hard work. You can also team up with friends using the **Teams and Friends system**, making collaboration easier and more fun. Plus, with **proximity-based voice chat**, communication becomes crucial—just be mindful when exploring dangerous areas like the Deep Dark, as talking too loudly near a **Warden** could spell disaster!


### OptiFine Parity:
If you’re an avid user of **OptiFine**, you’ll be pleased to know that this modpack supports most of the features you’re familiar with:
- **Shaders** for more realistic lighting and reflections
- **Connected textures** that allow blocks like glass and bookshelves to look seamless
- The famous **zoom function** that lets you see distant details
- **OptiFine-required resource packs**, so you can bring in all your favorite visual enhancements with ease

### Built for Everyone: From High-End PCs to Low-End Machines
We understand that not everyone is running on a high-end gaming PC, and this modpack is designed to offer **maximum flexibility**:
- For high-performance machines, the inclusion of mods like **Distant Horizons** gives you insane render distances, offering breathtaking views that stretch as far as the eye can see.
- For those with lower-end PCs, simply disabling shaders and a few demanding options (such as Distant Horizon) will allow you to achieve **smooth gameplay comparable to competitive gaming clients**. So, no matter your setup, you’ll be able to enjoy everything this modpack has to offer!

### Perfect for Long-Term Play
This modpack was created with a **long-term multiplayer server** in mind for friends to enjoy together, but it’s equally well-suited for solo adventures or your own server. We’ve built this pack to grow and evolve over time, with **frequent updates** ensuring you always have something new to explore, fix, or optimize.

Feel free to dive into this Vanilla+ modpack, whether you’re looking to explore new biomes, perfect your engineering skills, or just enjoy the beauty of Minecraft with a fresh twist. We’ve balanced everything to make sure the game feels like a **natural extension** of the base experience, perfect for long-term play without losing that familiar Minecraft magic.

Happy crafting and exploring!
